name: Organize Photos by Date
description: Automatically organize photos into date-based folders using EXIF metadata

steps.title: List all images in directory
steps.description: Scan the target directory and list all image files (jpg, png, heic, raw) with their full paths
steps.expected_output: A list of all image file paths found in the directory

steps.title: Read EXIF metadata
steps.description: Extract EXIF data from each image file, focusing on DateTimeOriginal, GPS coordinates, and camera model
steps.expected_output: A structured mapping of each file to its extracted metadata including date taken

steps.title: Create directories and move files
steps.description: Create year/month directory structure and move each photo into the appropriate folder based on its capture date
steps.expected_output: All photos moved into organized YYYY/MM/ directory structure

steps.title: Generate organization report
steps.description: Create a summary report showing how many files were organized, any files that couldn't be processed, and the final directory structure
steps.expected_output: A markdown report with statistics and directory tree visualization
